etymology.description: 宋(宋) (sòng, "Song dynasty; a surname") + 慶(慶) (qìng, "celebrate") + 齡(齡) (líng, "age") together specifically refer to Song Qingling, an influential historical figure.
etymology.interpretation: 宋(宋) (sòng, "Song dynasty; a surname") is a common Chinese surname. This combination refers specifically to Song Qingling, a prominent Chinese political figure and the wife of Sun Yat-sen, founder of the Republic of China. Her full name uses 慶(慶) (qìng, "celebrate") and 齡(齡) (líng, "age") as given name characters. This use of characters for personal names does not follow the meaning from the characters’ meanings such as "celebrate" or "age."

examples.chinese: 宋庆龄(宋慶齡)是中国革命的领袖之一(是中國革命的領袖之一)。
examples.pinyin: Sòng Qìnglíng shì Zhōngguó gémìng de lǐngxiù zhī yī.
examples.english: Song Qingling was one of the leaders of the Chinese revolution.

examples.chinese: 在历史上(在歷史上)，宋庆龄的贡献很大(宋慶齡的貢獻很大)。
examples.pinyin: Zài lìshǐ shàng, Sòng Qìnglíng de gòngxiàn hěn dà.
examples.english: In history, Song Qingling's contributions were significant.

examples.chinese: 许多人敬仰宋庆龄(許多人敬仰宋慶齡)的精神和勇气(的精神和勇氣)。
examples.pinyin: Xǔduō rén jìngyǎng Sòng Qìnglíng de jīngshén hé yǒngqì.
examples.english: Many people admire Song Qingling's spirit and courage.
